parameters.content:
## 🏢 Commercial Lease Abstraction

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for lease documents
2. Extracts rent, escalation, CAM, renewal options, termination terms
3. Captures parking, TI allowance, permitted use, and special provisions
4. Logs all terms to Google Sheets
5. Sends Slack alert with full lease summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for lease documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Property | Tenant | Landlord | Lease Start | Lease End | Term (Yrs) | Base Rent | Escalation | CAM | Renewal Options | Termination Notice | Processed Date
4. Update YOUR_FOLDER_ID in the Google Drive Trigger node
5. Update YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID in the Log to Sheets node
6. Update YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID in the Send to Slack node
7. Connect your Google Drive, Google Sheets, PDF Vector, and Slack credentials

### Perfect for
- Real estate attorneys
- Property managers
- REITs and portfolio managers

parameters.prompt: Extract commercial lease data. Return every field below. For text fields write the exact value from the document. For number fields write digits only, no $ or commas. If not found write N/A for text or 0 for numbers.
parameters.schema: {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": false, "properties": {"propertyAddress": {"type": "string", "description": "Full street address of leased property"}, "landlordName": {"type": "string", "description": "Landlord or lessor company name"}, "tenantName": {"type": "string", "description": "Tenant or lessee company name"}, "leaseStartDate": {"type": "string", "description": "Lease commencement date"}, "leaseEndDate": {"type": "string", "description": "Lease expiration date"}, "leaseTerm": {"type": "string", "description": "Total lease duration e.g. 5 years"}, "leaseType": {"type": "string", "description": "Lease type e.g. NNN, Gross, Modified Gross"}, "baseRentMonthly": {"type": "number", "description": "Monthly base rent in dollars"}, "baseRentAnnual": {"type": "number", "description": "Annual base rent in dollars"}, "rentEscalationPct": {"type": "number", "description": "Annual rent escalation percentage"}, "securityDeposit": {"type": "number", "description": "Security deposit amount in dollars"}, "camChargesMonthly": {"type": "number", "description": "Monthly CAM or operating expense charges"}, "operatingExpensesCap": {"type": "number", "description": "CAM expense cap percentage per year"}, "tenantImprovementAllowance": {"type": "number", "description": "Tenant improvement allowance in dollars"}, "usableSquareFeet": {"type": "number", "description": "Usable or rentable square footage"}, "parkingSpaces": {"type": "number", "description": "Number of parking spaces included"}, "parkingCostMonthly": {"type": "number", "description": "Monthly cost per parking space"}, "renewalOptionsList": {"type": "string", "description": "Renewal options e.g. 2 options of 3 years each"}, "terminationOptionsList": {"type": "string", "description": "Early termination option details"}, "permittedUse": {"type": "string", "description": "Permitted use of the premises"}, "sublettingAllowed": {"type": "boolean", "description": "Whether subletting is allowed"}, "keyRisksList": {"type": "string", "description": "Key risks or unusual clauses semicolon separated"}}}
